title: Martha Stewart Living
body: Martha Stewart Living is a magazine and television program featuring entertaining and lifestyle expert Martha Stewart. Both the magazine and the television program focus on lifestyle content and the domestic arts.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from October 2018
